verse.name: V1
verse.lines: For all You've done, For all You're going to do, We give You thanks and we lift our praise to You.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: We give thanks, We give praise, For we know that all things work together for our good. We give thanks, We give praise, For by faith we know Your grace will see us through.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: For all those things that we don't understand, We come by faith and place them in Your hands

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Even if we stumble, Even if we fall, You will not forsake us; You are King and Lord of all.
